scripts.dev: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000,3001 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess -Unique | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_ -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; exit 0" && node scripts/prepare-dev.mjs && next dev
scripts.dev:radmin: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000,3001 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess -Unique | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_ -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; exit 0" && node scripts/prepare-dev.mjs && node scripts/dev-radmin.mjs
scripts.dev:fresh: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000,3001 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess -Unique | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_ -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; exit 0" && node scripts/prepare-dev.mjs --fresh && next dev
scripts.prebuild: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000,3001 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess -Unique | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_ -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; if (Test-Path .next) { Remove-Item -Recurse -Force .next }; exit 0"
